executives.name: Michael Dell
executives.background: Michael S. Dell is the Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of Dell Technologies. He has served as Chairman of the Board since Dell's inception in 1984 and as Chief Executive Officer since 2004. Mr. Dell also served as CEO from 1984 to 2004.

executives.name: Jeff Clarke
executives.background: Jeff Clarke is the Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer of Dell Technologies. He is responsible for the company's global supply chain, global support and deployment, and the Infrastructure Solutions Group and Client Solutions Group.

tenure_dates.title: Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Yvonne McGill
executives.background: Yvonne McGill is the Chief Financial Officer of Dell Technologies. She previously served as Corporate Controller and CFO of the Infrastructure Solutions Group.

executives.name: David Dorman
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of AT&T Corp. and former Chairman of CVS Health Corporation.

executives.name: David Grain
executives.background: Founder and CEO of Grain Management, LLC. Former Lead Independent Director of Southern Company.

executives.name: Egon Durban
executives.background: Co-CEO of Silver Lake, a global technology investment firm.

executives.name: Forrest Norrod
executives.background: Mr. Norrod is AMD’s Executive Vice President and General Manager, Data Center Solutions Business Group. He joined AMD in 2014. Previously, he was Vice President and General Manager of Dell’s server business.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and General Manager, Server Platforms

executives.name: Janet Clark
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Marathon Oil Corporation.

executives.name: Jeremy Burton
executives.background: CEO of Observe, Inc. Former CMO of Dell Technologies and Executive Director at EMC.

executives.name: Lynn Vojvodich Radakovich
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Salesforce.

executives.name: Michael Cannon
executives.background: Mr. Cannon has been a director since 2011. He was President of Global Operations at Dell Inc.

executives.name: Steven Mollenkopf
executives.background: Independent Chair of the Board. Former CEO of Qualcomm Incorporated. He has extensive experience in engineering and technology leadership.

executives.name: William Green
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Accenture.
